product.title: KYDA AirBrush Foundation Spray with SPF 35, Silky Foundation Mist Makeup, Flawless Coverage for Smooth Creamy Nude Finish, Breathable Blendable Lasting Formula-#220 Natural Beige
featureBullets: 【Airbrush Foundation with SPF 35】Just like the airbrush effect, the base makeup shows flawless and high cover, creamy watery finish. The spray foundation presents an extremely delicate foundation to cover skin defects, fine lines and dullness with BREATHBALE MESH technology.

【Silky Smooth】By spraying, the foundation becomes more delicate, light and sheer, and it fits the skin better, thus creating a perfect creamy makeup base effect. With our foundation brush, it can slide on the skin more smoothly without floating powder, lines and creases.

【Skin Friendly & Sunscreen Formula】Lightweight breathable texture, containing natural clean formula with glycerin and Vitamin E skin care ingredients, also adds TITANIUM DIOXIDE and ZINC OXIDE(sunscreen ingredient), suitable for all skin types, creating a spray foundation for skin care.
【Instantly Light Up Makeup】With just one swipe, your skin will be instantly brightened, creating a perfect nude makeup naturally, and the originally dull skin will be instantly crystal clear.

【Foundation Beauty for All Skin】Foundation cream giving a soft mist matte effect, providing all coverage, enough for daily use. Clean and skin-friendly formula, and sensitive skin should be tested before first use. After the basic skin care step, gently shake the bottle, spray it on a puff or brush, and evenly apply it on the face skin. NOTE: PLEASE REFER TO THE ACTUAL PACKAGE RECEIVED. THE PICTURE IS FOR REFERENCE ONLY. THE PACKAGING IS UPDATED AND THE COLOR HAS NOT CHANGED.
product.returns: Non-returnable. Transportation of this item is subject to hazardous materials regulation

specification.value: #26,411 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #251 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the foundation spray provides full coverage without looking caked on and stays on all day. They appreciate its lightweight feel, smooth application, and beautiful dewy finish that looks great even when sweating. The texture receives positive feedback for being silky and smooth, and customers consider it worth the price. The color receives mixed reviews - while some say it matches their skin tone well, others find it too yellow.

reviews.reviewTitle: Excellent item, a MUST try for mature skin, even for those with novice makeup experience!
reviews.reviewText: Foremost, I admit, I have never used airbrush foundation, but have long been trying various other types, be they liquid or powder, as my skin has matured. I started seeing looks on other women of all ages that are fetchingly beautiful and they always reply to me that theirs is airbrushed. I started reviewing different ones and consulting reviews and I almost bought a much more expensive option until I saw the pictures and videos the reviewers posted. It was their videos, images, and helpful words that made me want to and finally decide to try this product. Now, I am NOT disappointed! I feel like my face and neck look years younger already, and in only a week of using this. Again, I had no idea what I was doing so my first spray I figured get the brush good and covered, almost dripping. I went straight to my forehead only with it and it felt like I'd applied Kilz paint primer with brush strokes. I felt like I had an instant migraine from the weight. I went and looked at the reviews again and there in the mist were the tips of... you don't need too much, contents lasts a little over two months, blot on in areas and then use a circular motion to apply. At the rate I was going before reading that none of that was going to happen for me, so I wiped it off and tried all of their useful suggestions and let me tell you what, these reviewers are RIGHT! If you do all of those things it looks like theirs, professionally done! It also looks natural, not caked, not painted on, nor streaked! I also took the tip of the reviewer who suggested getting two colors for contouring (not that I exactly understand about what that all entails, yet...), but because I have naturally tan skin, which gets a lot darker in the spring, summer and fall in my state. I noticed the natural beige I got was a little too light for this time of year in the south and that it would probably serve me in the slightly cooler months after the time change. I went and ordered the sunny color also and right now I use that daily, but I've started with her contouring suggestion of using both together and that makes it appear really even and balanced. I have a fully freckled face in which they seem to multiple on the daily despite my mother telling me they'd grow together to one color with age, ha! I know I'll never be freckle free, nor should I want to, but I do see that now using this product and a setting powder I also added to the new routine does hide uneven areas, red spots and blemishes now. There is no odor, no irritation, it stays on all day with no touch up needed, my skin feels softer, and the coverage looks flawless, almost like someone else with a cosmetology degree was applying it and not myself! It is a must try, especially if you have mature skin and want to knock a couple of years in age off from sun exposure with their gifts of fine lines and wrinkles like I have. The product does not sit in those areas and make them stand out, instead it makes them nearly invisible and it does not have a glittery or shiny appearance that works on younger skin, but not on older skin either. The reviewers here helped this novice achieve something I would have not thought possible in my lifetime unless visiting a professional makeup artist and I cannot thank them all enough. You will not be disappointed in this airbrush foundation. The brushes are super soft and move well on the face for even application. Finally, I will say I did not notice any after spray of this staining anything in my bathroom as others mentioned seeing with the natural (lighter) color, but I did notice it happening with the sunny (darker) version. As such, I just use a small hand towel (not the decorative ones!) as suggested by yet another helpful reviewer when applying it to the brush and if any overflow comes off anywhere in the bathroom, I spritz a little of Dawn power wash dish spray on it and wipe off with a paper towel.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 10, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Easy to Apply - Beautiful Dewey Finish on Older skin - Covers Redness Perfectly - Not Cakey
reviews.reviewText: It has been quite some time since I tried a new foundation makeup. I am 64 years old and foundation in general makes older women look even older, so I have avoided wearing it for about 10 years now. I have pale skin that is splotchy with red most days. Its just my coloring. It is so noticeable that when I was young, I would sometimes use a green foundation primer to mask the red. I was so tired of the redness, I decided to take a chance and try this airbrush foundation. My first time trying this type. Here is my experience: 1. NO allergic reaction to this product, and I tend to be allergic to most anything new I try on my face, making it swell up like a football. 2. Very simple to apply, no special skills needed. You just spray a little on the brush and dab it on. 3. I LOVE the brush, very good quality, imo. 4. Really beautiful, youthful dewy finish, exactly what I was hoping for. 5. This foundation does NOT look heavy at ALL on my aging skin. 6. One application not only stays on the entire day, but it completely obliterates the red splotchiness - and without layering it on! 7. Feels so light on my skin, I forget I have anything on. This foundation solved all my foundation problems so perfectly that I have begun wearing makeup every day after many years of not wearing any. Highly, HIGHLY recommend, especially for any other older ladies out there who have given up on trying to find a foundation that works on older skin and does not look heavy. I didn’t think such a thing existed.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 27, 2024

reviews.reviewText: color is very good, application is the easiest ever, better than and foundation product applied by hand or sponge or brush. I’m hooked, just wish it had SPF. I apply N SpF makeup quality cream before this foundation with great success.
